title: MC & Geometry
summary: Demo notebook for Monte Carlo validation of 3 lag-1 autocorrelation estimators (standard, Marriott-Pope corrected, MLE) and three-pronged geometric confound analysis on synthetic trees and real UD dependency sentences. Task A runs MC simulation across configurable parameter cells. Task B analyzes excess autocorrelation using RPL baselines. Mini demo data contains 9 UD dependency tree sentences. Visualization includes bias curves, synthetic tree excess bar charts, and real-tree excess histograms.
